Ponsiano De Loor - I started web development in 2012 with native PHP, WordPress, and desktop Java, but in 2018 I discovered my first framework, SpringBoot, with Maven. In 2021, I used Python for FastAPI and Apache Airflow to sync data and documents. Currently, I work in a REST architecture with Keycloak, Angular, and SpringBoot, building microservices. However, it's necessary to ensure and maintain high application availability to prevent attacks with the best architectures of Openshift and Fortinet. When I finish a blockchain development using Rust, I'll be able to call myself a full-stack web developer.
